title: Diamond Diadem
description: Whenever you play [blue]2[/blue] or fewer cards in a turn, take half damage from enemies.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Displays a counter showing cards played this turn. At end of turn, if 2 or fewer cards were played, applies DiamondDiademPower for half damage reduction. Counter resets at the start of each turn.
